pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and export_result.sh specify this exact path
export_result.sh verifies the volume mounts with this exact string
setup_task.sh injects the leak here and export_result.sh checks it

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated VeraCrypt volume and bash history file. It is explicitly verified that the volume path is '/home/ga/Volumes/internal_ops.hc', the history file containing the leak is '/home/ga/.bash_history', and the target password checked by the evaluation script is 'SecuredCredential2025!'.
